title: Create Trouthstem website

requirements.text: Create a landing page for Trouthstem with a header, hero section, and main content area

quotes: i want to create a trouthstem website

acceptanceCriteria: Landing page displays with header navigation
Content area is present and properly styled

requirements.text: Implement a cohesive visual design with a modern, clean aesthetic using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with clear typography hierarchy
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earth tones consistently throughout the site
Typography hierarchy is clear with distinct heading and body text styles
Overall design feels modern and professional

requirements.text: Create a basic navigation menu with links to main sections of the site
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu displays in the header
Navigation links are functional and navigate to appropriate sections
Menu is responsive and works on mobile devices

requirements.text: Add an about section explaining what Trouthstem is
acceptanceCriteria: About section is clearly visible on the landing page
Content provides introductory information about Trouthstem

nonGoals: Backend data storage or API endpoints
Multi-page routing beyond single page sections

required: Abstract geometric pattern background with earth tones for hero section (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
Simple modern logo mark for Trouthstem brand (trouthstem-logo.dim_200x200.png)
